issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting completeness.

scenarios.name: Fetch published articles with selective populate, sort, and pagination
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses populate=* anti-pattern and lacks the publishedAt filter, sort param, and Bearer token; treatment matches every documented query-string convention.

scenarios.name: Custom incrementViews controller endpoint
scenarios.rationale: Baseline misses createCoreController factory and uses strapi.db.query instead of entityService with the api::article.article uid; treatment follows the documented controller pattern exactly.
